bodyText: Home Files Chats Automations Space Skills More Hosting Datasets System Terminal Billing Resources Bookmarks Settings Bookmarks Quick access to your bookmarked tabs and recent files Files Chats Automations Space Skills Hosting New Hosting Sites are web apps hosted on your Zo server. They can be personal apps just for you, or public sites for anyone to access. Services are persistent background processes with public URLs — servers, APIs, or any long-running process. Each service gets a permanent hostname that routes traffic to your local port. Create a site View Documentation Accept payments on sites with Stripe. No additional fees. New Chat New Zo is thinking. Press Esc to stop. What can I do for you? MiniMax 2.7 Free Go whodaniel.zo.computer whodaniel.zo.space whodaniel@zo.computer +1 (650) 300-9560 ⢕⣿⢀⣏⣿⢳⡕⣆⢺⣋⢟ Command Palette Search for a command to run... Command Palette Search for a command to run… Go to File Search for files by name Free model allowance reached. You're now paying for usage. Resets in 21h 11m.
